currentOpportunities.name: best-gaming-laptops-under-1000
currentOpportunities.rationale: gamer segment CTR on p1+p4 is 22%+. No dedicated mid-price gaming page exists. Revenue gap: £85/unit payout × estimated 12 missed conversions.

currentOpportunities.name: best-laptops-for-students
currentOpportunities.rationale: student segment has highest conversion bias (1.10×) but no dedicated value-focused landing page. p2, p7, p8 all have value_score >= 83 at budget/mid price bands.

currentOpportunities.name: best-laptops-for-coding
currentOpportunities.rationale: professional segment CTR on p3+p9 is 16-18%. Developer intent has no dedicated landing page. 5 products qualify with productivity_score >= 88.

currentOpportunities.name: lightweight-laptops-for-travel
currentOpportunities.rationale: portability signal is under-represented in existing pages. 5 laptops qualify with portability >= 80 AND battery >= 80. Travel segment is under-served.

currentOpportunities.name: ultrabooks
currentOpportunities.rationale: Cluster of 5 products (p3, p4, p6, p9, p12) with portability >= 80 and battery >= 80. No ultrabook-specific category exists. Estimated 30% engagement uplift from targeted content.

currentOpportunities.name: p10-conversion-optimisation
currentOpportunities.rationale: p10 (Dell Inspiron 15): conversionRate 0.04, well below category average 0.074. High value_score (87) suggests ranking issue not product quality issue.

currentOpportunities.name: monitors-geo-coverage
currentOpportunities.rationale: monitors GEO page has lower entity density vs laptops. No intent-specific landing pages exist for monitors. gaming-monitors and creative-monitors intents unserved.

revenueScans.suggestion: Increase ranking visibility for student segment where value_score is primary signal. Add to best-laptops-for-students page.
p8 has highest conversion rate (11%) but low payout. Increase traffic via student and budget intent pages to capitalise on conversion efficiency.
Highest affiliate payout product (£95). Add dedicated professional/creator intent page to capture premium segment traffic.
Top revenue product but low conversion rate vs payout potential. Creative/professional landing page would increase segment-specific conversion.
